findings.title: user-visible changes missing changelog update
findings.details: User-visible code changes detected (internal/adapter/agent.go, internal/adapter/runtime.go, internal/container/process.go, internal/run/manifest.go, internal/run/taskcopy.go, internal/runner/logs.go, internal/runner/status.go, internal/runner/timeout.go, internal/workspace/metadata.go) without updating CHANGELOG.md. Add a user-facing entry under CHANGELOG.md before finishing the task.
